top3.sql:
SELECT d_date
FROM store_sales, date_dim
WHERE ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
  AND d_year = 2000
  AND d_moy = 11
GROUP BY d_date
ORDER BY SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) DESC
LIMIT 100
